pi_items.verified_value: 300-600 range is plausible based on industry cable reel calculation formulas
pi_items.source: Verified through cable reel capacity formula analysis: Using industry formula Capacity = (A+B)×A×C×K where A=(H-D)/2, calculated capacity with clearance adjustment = 597.9 meters (upper bound of range); Without clearance = 858.6 meters (exceeds range). Range of 300-600m is consistent with adjusted calculation.
Verified through cable reel capacity calculation; calculated value of 597.9 meters aligns with this upper bound when clearance reduces effective flange diameter
task.json and export_result.sh script both reference this path consistently
task.json and task_setup script both reference this path
Verified via Google Play Store and multiple APK repositories; app exists and can be installed from provided APK in scripts/apks/

Comprehensive search of Google Play Store listing, APKCombo, APKPure, Aptoide, and official documentation. App features documented include: Resistor color coding, power calculations, transformer calculations, CT/PT calculations, lighting calculations, and Cable Size Calculator. No Cable Reel Capacity calculator is listed in any official documentation.

privileged_info_summary: The task specifies synthetic cable dimensions (flange 800mm, barrel 400mm, width 500mm, cable 16mm) with a 50mm edge clearance. Using industry-standard cable reel capacity formulas (Capacity = (A+B)×A×C×K where K=0.2618/(cable_diameter²)), the calculated capacity is approximately 597.9 meters when the clearance reduces the effective flange diameter, which falls within the specified expected range of 300-600 meters. The task inputs and expected output ranges are numerically consistent with electrical engineering cable reel capacity calculations. However, the Electrical Calculations app (com.hsn.electricalcalculations) version 2.2.8 documented in Google Play Store and official repositories does not list a Cable Reel Capacity calculator among its features—it includes Cable Size Calculator and standard electrical calculations, but not cable reel/drum capacity calculations.
